system.description: Each time the wearer of this cloak suffers damage, it grants the cloak 1d6, to a maximum of 4d6. At any point later, the wearer can discharge these accumulated dice as an attack, doing the damage to a single target within 20m. The target can roll DEX 10+ to take half damage. Vehicles take half AV damage (rounded down). The Cloak will fray to nothing after 1d3+3 uses.
